problem_solved: Endless administrative tasks and documentation burden reduce clinician presence and contribute to burnout
solution_description: Ambient clinical intelligence platform that handles documentation, coding, and clinical tasks. Works across desktop and mobile (iOS/Android) for 100+ specialties. Adapts to various care settings and integrates with all major EHRs. Provides ambient listening and voice commands
traction_signals: 72% reduction in time spent taking notes
Average $3,200 increase in incremental monthly revenue per user
notes: Strong ROI metrics with documented practice satisfaction improvements. Multi-platform support. Revenue increase signals strong clinical adoption
